objects.label: bed
objects.long_form_open_description: Close-up view of a beige-and-cream striped bedspread draped over a dark wooden footboard, showing woven fabric texture and wrinkles; partial/edge-cropped view of the bed, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
scene_attributes: wall-mounted/stand TV sitting on top of a wooden dresser
ceiling fan visible and reflected in TV screen
partially open interior door on right
striped bedding on visible bed corner
visible electrical outlet with cable near baseboard

objects.label: tv
objects.long_form_open_description: Large reflective black flat-screen TV with a thin bezel; the dark glass surface fills most of the crop and clearly reflects the room (ceiling fan, two bedside lamps and a dresser), showing mild glare and faint smudges — estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.

objects.label: fan
objects.description: brown wooden-blade ceiling fan edge crop
